chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-222 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A. 2869/2025 3. For hearing of main case 05.05.2025 Mr. Sulleman Dahri Advocate for the Applicant along with Applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General along with Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and Inspector Farhan Shaikh PS Site Hyderabad. -.-.-. SHO Site Hyderabad has filed Report wherein he has produced the detenue who is present in Court and is sui juris and states that she has made freewill nikah of her own liberty and mindfulness and she is happily living with her husband Shaman Ali Magsi. The Applicant is also present in person and requests that she may be allowed to meet the detenue. The detenue produced present states that she has no harm in meeting her mother or getting in contact with her. In such circumstances, this matter is disposed off with an observation that the detenue is free to live her life of her own freewill. J U D G E Ali Haider
